name: Zsh with Oh My Zsh and Powerlevel10k
description: Setup Zsh shell with Oh My Zsh, custom plugins, and Powerlevel10k theme

preInstalledPlugins.description: Pre-installed Oh My Zsh plugins to activate (e.g. 'git,git-auto-fetch')

customPlugins.description: Custom plugins to install: 'plugin-name1:url1,plugin-name2:url2' - supports .git and .zip URLs

powerlevel10kConfig.description: URL to download Powerlevel10k configuration file

deletePreinstalledThemes.description: Remove pre-installed themes before installing Powerlevel10k
